title: Rolling Stone's Oscars 2026 Best Actor Predictions
text: The nominees are: Leonardo DiCaprio (One Battle After Another), Michael B. Jordan (Sinners), Timothée Chalamet (Marty Supreme), Ethan Hawke (Blue Moon), Wagner Moura (The Secret Agent). Who Will Win: Michael B. Jordan takes the top spot in Rolling Stone's prediction. While Chalamet generated significant momentum through his star power and campaign strategy, Jordan's win at the SAG Awards positions him as the frontrunner. The publication notes that Jordan is as much a movie star and a Next Great Generation Talent contender as Timmy C. is. Who Should Win: Michael B. Jordan again, according to the critic's assessment of his dual role performance as twin brothers Smoke and Stack in Sinners. Key Analysis: The article highlights how Jordan's performance involves moments when you watch his dual performances and have to consciously remind yourself that you are not watching two separate actors, demonstrating technical mastery worthy of recognition.
